name: Heavy Gauge Stainless Steel Kadhai
description: Premium heavy-gauge stainless steel kadhai perfect for deep frying and Indian cooking. Sturdy handles with heat-resistant grip.

name: Triply Stainless Steel Tawa
description: Flat triply tawa ideal for making rotis, dosas, and parathas. Even heat distribution for perfect cooking.

name: Stainless Steel Pressure Cooker 5L
description: ISI certified 5-litre pressure cooker with safety valve and gasket release system. Perfect for daily Indian cooking.

name: Non-Stick Dosa Tawa
description: Large non-stick dosa tawa with cool-touch handle. PFOA free coating for healthy cooking.

name: Copper Bottom Patila Set
description: Set of 3 patila with copper bottom for quick and even heating. Includes lids. Ideal for boiling and curry making.

name: Stainless Steel Thali Set
description: Complete thali set with 12-inch plate and 4 matching katoris. Mirror polish finish. Perfect for daily meals.

name: Steel Water Glass Set (6 pcs)
description: Set of 6 stainless steel glasses with mirror finish. Unbreakable and perfect for everyday use.

name: Stainless Steel Lunch Box 3-Tier
description: Leak-proof 3-tier stainless steel tiffin box. Keeps food fresh for hours. Ideal for office and school.

name: Steel Masala Dabba (Spice Box)
description: Traditional masala dabba with 7 compartments and individual lids. See-through lid option. Kitchen essential.

name: Stainless Steel Serving Spoon Set
description: Set of 6 serving spoons with different sizes. Includes ladle, slotted spoon, and serving fork. Mirror polish.

name: Crystal Clear Glass Tumbler Set
description: Premium borosilicate glass tumblers. Microwave and dishwasher safe. Elegant design for modern dining.

name: Decorative Glass Jug with Lid
description: Beautiful glass jug with stainless steel lid. Perfect for serving water, juice, and cold beverages.

name: Glass Mixing Bowl Set
description: Tempered glass mixing bowls with measurement markings. Microwave safe. Perfect for cooking and serving.

name: Glass Storage Jar Set
description: Airtight glass storage jars with bamboo lids. Keep dry fruits, spices, and snacks fresh. Modern kitchen aesthetic.

name: Wine Glass Set
description: Elegant crystal wine glasses with long stems. Lead-free crystal for a premium dining experience.

name: Bone China Dinner Set 27 Pcs
description: Exquisite 27-piece bone china dinner set with floral design. Includes dinner plates, side plates, bowls, cups and saucers.

name: Melamine Dinner Set 18 Pcs
description: Unbreakable melamine dinner set with contemporary design. BPA free and dishwasher safe. Great for families.

name: Ceramic Mug Set (6 pcs)
description: Hand-painted ceramic mugs with traditional Indian motifs. Microwave safe. Perfect for chai and coffee lovers.

name: Porcelain Tea Set
description: Elegant 15-piece porcelain tea set with gold trim. Includes teapot, sugar bowl, milk jug, and 6 cups with saucers.

name: Ceramic Serving Bowl Set
description: Handcrafted stoneware serving bowls in earthy tones. Oven and microwave safe. Beautiful rustic presentation.

name: Premium Cutlery Set 24 Pcs
description: Premium 24-piece cutlery set with matte black handles. Includes 6 each of dinner knives, forks, tablespoons, and teaspoons.

name: Wooden Handle Knife Set
description: Professional knife set with genuine sheesham wood handles. Includes chef's knife, bread knife, utility knife, paring knife, and scissors.

name: Gold Plated Dessert Spoon Set
description: Elegant gold-plated dessert spoons. Perfect for special occasions and festive dining. Comes in a gift box.

name: Serving Tongs & Ladle Set
description: Kitchen-grade serving tongs, ladle, spatula, and pasta server. Heat resistant handles. Essential cooking tools.

name: Baby Feeding Cutlery Set
description: Safe and colorful baby feeding set with rounded edges. Includes spoon, fork, and training chopsticks.

name: Brass Puja Thali Set
description: Traditional brass puja thali set with diya, bell, agarbatti holder, and kumkum container. Beautifully engraved.

name: Copper Water Bottle
description: Ayurvedic pure copper water bottle with leak-proof cap. Health benefits of copper-charged water. Handcrafted design.

name: Decorative Brass Flower Vase
description: Hand-carved brass flower vase with intricate Rajasthani design. A statement piece for your living room.

name: Copper Serving Handi
description: Traditional copper handi with hammered finish. Food-safe tin lining inside. Perfect for serving biryani and curries.

name: Silver Plated Gift Set
description: Exquisite silver-plated bowl and spoon set in premium gift box. Perfect for weddings, festivals, and housewarming gifts.

name: Cast Iron Dosa Tawa
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron dosa tawa. Gets better with use. Natural non-stick properties. Adds iron to food.

name: Terracotta Biryani Handi
description: Traditional terracotta handi for dum biryani. Slow cooking in clay enhances flavors naturally. Comes with lid.
